sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81721" key="perina/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περινάω</orth>, <sense id="n81721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">float</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flow around</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄμυλοι π. ἡμῖν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0475.tlg001:6:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Metag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
